## Verification

- [ ] `pre-commit run --all-files`
- [ ] Relevant backend/mobile tests, or a clear reason they were not run
- [ ] Docs links or generated reports checked when documentation changed

## Team Policy Checklist

- [ ] Target branch is `develop` unless this is a release PR to `main`
- [ ] Branch name follows `<type>/<scope>-<kebab-subject>`
- [ ] PR title follows `<type>(<scope>): <subject>`
- [ ] Commit/PR subject is imperative, has no trailing period, and is <= 50 chars
- [ ] No `.env`, secret, private key, raw OCR text, provider payload, or request header is included
- [ ] Generated OCR evaluation artifacts are excluded unless explicitly approved
- [ ] Relevant `docs/team-collaboration/` guidance was checked
